webSearch.baseUrl.label: Open-WebSearch Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Optional override for the managed local daemon URL, such as http://127.0.0.1:3210.

webSearch.autoStart.label: Auto-start managed daemon
webSearch.autoStart.help: Start and keep the bundled open-websearch daemon running with gateway startup.

webSearch.host.label: Managed daemon host
webSearch.host.help: Loopback host used for the managed open-websearch daemon.

webSearch.port.label: Managed daemon port
webSearch.port.help: Loopback port used for the managed open-websearch daemon.

webSearch.startupTimeoutMs.label: Managed daemon startup timeout
webSearch.startupTimeoutMs.help: How long CrawClaw waits for the managed open-websearch daemon to become ready.
